notes: All 9 responses (Qwen3.5-4B Q8 across t0.1/0.4/0.7 x 3 reps) are highly consistent and uniformly strong on the real structure: every component, shape, color, and labeled protocol (HTTPS, gRPC x2) is correct, with correct left-to-right branching and Auth->Postgres / Worker->Redis wiring. The single universal miss is the dangling/phantom third gRPC line from the API Gateway — none of the nine detected it. Differentiators are minor: responses that explicitly note the DB links are unlabeled and avoid speculating score higher (rep1@t0.1, rep2@t0.4); rep1@t0.4 is weakest because it treats the explicit Worker Queue gRPC label as only 'implied' (a subtle undercount) and adds the most hedged protocol guesses. rep0@t0.1 is the only one to make a mildly incorrect guess (AMQP for Redis). No response fabricated components or phantom connections.
